app.title: VPy IDE
dialog.conflict.title: File Conflict Detected
dialog.conflict.message: The file "{{fileName}}" has been modified externally during compilation.
dialog.conflict.explanation: This means the file was changed by another program while you were editing it.
dialog.conflict.reloadTooltip: Load the external changes and lose your current changes
dialog.conflict.forceTooltip: Keep your changes and overwrite the external file
message.noBuildOutput: No build output yet. Press Run.
message.noCompilerOutput: No output yet. Build a project to see compilation logs here.
debug.emptyHint:
No debug output yet.
Use DEBUG_PRINT(var) or DEBUG_PRINT_STR(str) in your VPy code.
debug.footerHint: Debug output from VPy DEBUG_PRINT functions. Variables update in real-time.
welcome.title: Vectrex Studio
welcome.subtitle: Open a workspace, folder or create a new file.
welcome.recent.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear the workspace history?
settings.title: Settings
settings.compiler.description: Select which compiler backend to use for building VPy projects.
settings.compiler.buildtools.title: Buildtools (New)
settings.compiler.buildtools.desc: Modular 9-phase pipeline. Supports multibank ROMs and PDB debug symbols. Some edge cases may not compile correctly yet.
settings.compiler.core.title: Core (Legacy)
settings.compiler.core.desc: Original compiler. Stable and well-tested. Always outputs a fixed 32KB ROM. No PDB debug symbols. Recommended for most projects.
settings.note: Note: Changes take effect on the next build. The compiler setting is saved in your browser's local storage.
session.deleteConfirm: Delete this session? All history will be lost.
template.game.name: Vectrex Game
template.game.desc: Create a new Vectrex game project with main loop structure and basic graphics setup.
template.library.name: VPy Library
template.library.desc: Create a reusable library package that can be shared across multiple projects.
ai.clearHistoryConfirm: Clear all conversation history for this session?
ai.context.label: 📎 Context:
ai.welcome.title: 🤖 **PyPilot** activated
ai.welcome.intro: I'm your specialized assistant for **Vectrex VPy development**. I can help you with:
ai.welcome.generateCode: 🔧 **Generate VPy code** - Describe what you want to create
ai.welcome.analyzeErrors: 🐛 **Analyze errors** - Explain problems in your code
ai.welcome.controlIde: 🎛️ **Control IDE** - Open/close projects, create files, etc.
ai.welcome.mcpEnabled: 🔧 **MCP Tools Enabled** - I can control the IDE directly
ai.welcome.question: How can I help you today?
ai.help.title: 📋 **Available commands:**
ai.help.example1: `/generate a bouncing ball at screen edges`
ai.help.example3: `/fix` (when there are errors in the panel)
ai.clear.message: 🗑️ Conversation cleared. How can I help you?
ai.error.unknownCommand:
❌ Unknown command: `{{cmd}}`

Use `/help` to see available commands.
ai.examples.title: 📝 **VPy Code Examples:**
ai.examples.wantMore: Want to see examples of something specific?
ai.assets.title: 🎨 **Using Assets in VPy**
ai.ui.inputPlaceholder: Ask something or use /help to see commands...
ai.command.explain.noCode: ⚠️ Select code in the editor first, then use `/explain`
ai.command.optimize.noCode: ⚠️ Select code in the editor first, then use `/optimize`
ai.settings.connectionFailed:
⚠️ Connection test failed for {{provider}}.

Possible issues:
• Check your API key is correct
• Rate limit exceeded (wait a moment)
• Service temporarily unavailable

Do you want to save the configuration anyway?
You can try sending a message to test if it works.
ai.settings.connectionError:
⚠️ Error testing connection: {{error}}

Do you want to save the configuration anyway?
dialog.unsavedChanges: File has unsaved changes. Close anyway?
